subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the breaths of God! Upon thee be the glory of God and His praise, His tender mercies, His bounty, His benevolence and His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و الطافه و جوده و احسانه و فضله
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
